description: One dialog_pronunciation scene per A1 and A2 lesson. Each dialog has 6 AI lines (spoken by TTS) and 5 user lines (recorded and scored by Groq Whisper). Injected into each lesson JSON before the recap reading.

greetings-story.title: First day — meeting Mr. Kumar
greetings-story.pt_summary: Seu primeiro dia na Amazing School. Mr. Kumar te recebe.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good morning! Welcome to Amazing School.
turns.pt: Bom dia! Bem-vindo à Amazing School.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Good morning. My name is Leo.
turns.pt_hint: Bom dia. Meu nome é Leo.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice to meet you, Leo. How are you today?
turns.pt: Prazer em te conhecer, Leo. Como vai hoje?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am fine, thank you. And you?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I am very well. Where are you from?
turns.pt: Estou muito bem. De onde você é?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am from Brazil.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Wonderful. Your first class is at nine.
turns.pt: Maravilha. Sua primeira aula é às nove.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. See you later.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: One more thing — have a great day!
turns.pt: Mais uma coisa — tenha um ótimo dia!

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: You too. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Goodbye, Leo. See you tomorrow.

alphabet-parade.title: Spelling your name
alphabet-parade.pt_summary: Soletrando nomes em inglês — atenção nas letras difíceis G/J, E/I, V/W, Y.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hello. Please tell me your full name.
turns.pt: Olá. Por favor, diga seu nome completo.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My name is Maria Silva.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Could you spell your first name, please?
turns.pt: Pode soletrar seu primeiro nome, por favor?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: M. A. R. I. A. Maria.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you. And your last name?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: S. I. L. V. A. Silva.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. Could you also spell 'Brazil' for me?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: B. R. A. Z. I. L. Brazil.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Excellent pronunciation.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you very much.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You are welcome. See you next class.
turns.pt: De nada. Até a próxima aula.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi there. Could I have your phone number?
turns.pt: Oi. Pode me passar seu número de telefone?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, it is nine eight seven six five four three two one.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you. How old are you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am twenty-five years old.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: The total is fifteen dollars.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Here are twenty dollars.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Your change is five dollars.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. Have a good day.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You too. One more thing — keep your receipt.
turns.pt: Você também. Mais uma coisa — guarde seu recibo.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: OK. Goodbye.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Goodbye. See you soon.

to-be-story.title: Introductions with verb TO BE
to-be-story.pt_summary: Treinando I am / you are / she is em apresentações.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi. I am Zara. I am a teacher.
turns.pt: Oi. Eu sou a Zara. Sou professora.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Hello. I am Leo. I am a student.
turns.pt_hint: Use I am para se apresentar.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice to meet you. Are you from Brazil?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I am. I am from São Paulo.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: São Paulo is a big city, right?
turns.pt: São Paulo é uma cidade grande, né?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, it is very big and very busy.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Are your parents Brazilian too?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, they are. They are from Rio.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Wonderful. Welcome to our class.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. I am very happy to be here.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. Let's start the lesson.

articles-basic.title: Ordering at the bakery (A / AN / THE)
articles-basic.pt_summary: Artigos A / AN / THE em pedidos.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good morning. What can I get you today?
turns.pt: Bom dia. O que posso servir hoje?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I would like a coffee and an apple, please.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Would you like the big coffee or the small one?
turns.pt: O café grande ou o pequeno?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The big coffee, please.
turns.pt_hint: THE porque o outro já foi mencionado.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, an orange juice, please.
turns.pt_hint: AN antes de orange (som de vogal).

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Is that for here or to go?
turns.pt: É para comer aqui ou levar?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: To go, please. I am in a hurry.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: That will be eight dollars.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Here you are. Thank you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have a wonderful morning.

there-is-there-are.title: Describing a room
there-is-there-are.pt_summary: There is / There are — descrevendo um apartamento.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome. Let me show you the apartment.
turns.pt: Bem-vindo. Deixa eu te mostrar o apartamento.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. Is there a kitchen?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, there is a big kitchen right here.
turns.pt: Sim, há uma grande cozinha bem aqui.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Are there two bedrooms?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, there are two bedrooms and one bathroom.
turns.pt: Sim, há dois quartos e um banheiro.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Is there a balcony?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, there is a lovely balcony with a view.
turns.pt: Sim, há uma varanda linda com vista.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Are there any shops nearby?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, there are many. The supermarket is next door.
turns.pt: Sim, muitas. O supermercado é ao lado.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I love it. How much is the rent?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: It is one thousand dollars per month.

plurals-regular-irregular.title: At the fruit market
plurals-regular-irregular.pt_summary: Plurais regulares e irregulares — fruit/fruits, child/children, foot/feet.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hello. Would you like some fresh fruits?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes. I want three apples and two oranges.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Of course. Do you need any vegetables?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, four tomatoes and six potatoes.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Are the apples for your children?
turns.pt: As maçãs são para seus filhos?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, for my three children.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Lovely. Anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I need two loaves of bread.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Here you go. That is twenty dollars.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. Have a nice day.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You too. Come back tomorrow!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to the international festival. Where are you from?
turns.pt: Bem-vindo ao festival internacional. De onde você é?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am from Brazil. I am Brazilian.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Wonderful. What languages do you speak?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I speak Portuguese and a little English.
turns.pt_hint: 'Falo português e um pouco de inglês.'

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Have you met our Japanese guests?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, I have not. Where are they from in Japan?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: They are from Tokyo. And our French guests are from Paris.
turns.pt: São de Tóquio. Nossos convidados franceses são de Paris.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is amazing. Is that Italian food over there?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, and it is delicious. Please try some.
turns.pt: Sim, e está deliciosa. Prove um pouco.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. I love Italian food.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Enjoy the festival!

question-words.title: The reporter interview
question-words.pt_summary: Question words — Who / What / Where / When / Why / How.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi. I am a reporter. Can I ask you some questions?
turns.pt: Oi. Sou repórter. Posso te fazer perguntas?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Sure. What do you want to know?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Where do you live?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I live in São Paulo.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: When did you move there?
turns.pt: Quando você se mudou pra lá?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I moved there two years ago.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Why did you choose São Paulo?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Because I got a new job there.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you feel about the city?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I feel great. I love it.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you for your time.

imperatives.title: Cooking with Chef Rafa
imperatives.pt_summary: Imperativos — open, cut, mix, add, stir, serve.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to my kitchen. Are you ready to cook?
turns.pt: Bem-vindo à minha cozinha. Pronto para cozinhar?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I am ready. Tell me what to do.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: First, wash your hands and open the fridge.
turns.pt: Primeiro, lave as mãos e abra a geladeira.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: OK. What should I take out?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Take out two eggs and some cheese.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Here they are. What's next?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Now cut the cheese and mix it with the eggs.
turns.pt: Agora corte o queijo e misture com os ovos.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Done. Should I add salt?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, add a little salt and stir well.
turns.pt: Sim, adicione um pouco de sal e mexa bem.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: OK, I am stirring now.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. Serve it hot. Enjoy!

first-words-out-loud.title: Pronunciation diagnostic
first-words-out-loud.pt_summary: Diagnóstico de pronúncia — frases curtas e diagnósticas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! I want to hear your English. Ready?
turns.pt: Oi! Quero ouvir seu inglês. Pronto?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I am ready to start.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. Repeat after me — Hello, how are you?
turns.pt: Ótimo. Repete depois de mim — Hello, how are you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Hello, how are you?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice. Now — Thank you very much.
turns.pt: Bom. Agora — Thank you very much.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you very much.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good. Try — I am a student from Brazil.
turns.pt: Tenta — I am a student from Brazil.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am a student from Brazil.
turns.pt_hint: I am a student from Brazil.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Excellent. One more — Nice to meet you.
turns.pt: Excelente. Mais uma — Nice to meet you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Nice to meet you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You did great. Let's keep practicing!

family-photo.title: Showing family photos
family-photo.pt_summary: Vocabulário de família — mother, father, brother, sister.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hey, look at this photo. This is my family.
turns.pt: Ei, olha essa foto. Essa é minha família.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Who is the man on the left?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: That is my father. He is a lawyer.
turns.pt: É meu pai. Ele é advogado.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: And the woman in the middle?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: That is my mother. She is a doctor.
turns.pt: É minha mãe. Ela é médica.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: You have a big family. How many siblings?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Two — one brother and one sister.
turns.pt: Dois — um irmão e uma irmã.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How old is your sister?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: She is twelve. She loves to swim.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Your family looks wonderful.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you so much!

rafas-menu.title: Ordering at Tropical Bites
rafas-menu.pt_summary: No food truck do Rafa — pedindo tacos, salgados e sucos.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome to Tropical Bites. What can I get you?
turns.pt: Bem-vindo ao Tropical Bites. O que vai querer?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Hi. I would like two chicken tacos.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Spicy or mild?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Mild, please. I cannot eat spicy food.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: No problem. Would you like a drink?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, one orange juice, please.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Small, medium, or large?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Medium, please.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: That will be twelve dollars.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Here is my card.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you. Your order will be ready in five minutes.
turns.pt: Obrigado. Seu pedido fica pronto em cinco minutos.

rafas-truck-day.title: A day in the food truck
rafas-truck-day.pt_summary: Rotina diária no trabalho — verbos no presente simples.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! Want to see how my day goes?
turns.pt: Oi! Quer ver como é meu dia?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I do. What time do you start?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I wake up at five and open the truck at seven.
turns.pt: Acordo às cinco e abro o food truck às sete.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is very early. Do you eat breakfast first?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, I always have coffee and bread.
turns.pt: Sim, sempre tomo café e pão.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How many customers do you have every day?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: About one hundred. We close at eight in the evening.
turns.pt: Uns cem. Fechamos às oito da noite.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Do you work on weekends too?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes, but I take Mondays off.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: You work really hard. I admire you.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you. Come by anytime!

where-is-cosmo.title: Looking for Cosmo
where-is-cosmo.pt_summary: Preposições de lugar — in, on, under, behind, next to.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Oh no! I cannot find Cosmo. Have you seen him?
turns.pt: Ah não! Não acho o Cosmo. Você viu ele?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, I have not. Is he in the house?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I looked in the living room. He is not there.
turns.pt: Olhei na sala. Não está lá.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Is he under the table?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: No, he is not under the table either.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Maybe he is behind the sofa.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Good idea. Let me check.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Or in the garden, next to the flowers.
turns.pt_hint: 'Ou no jardim, ao lado das flores.'

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes! He is on the grass, sleeping.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am happy we found him.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thank you for helping me.

bias-week.title: Bia's weekly schedule
bias-week.pt_summary: Dias da semana e present simple — o que a Bia faz em cada dia.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! Want to know what I do every week?
turns.pt: Oi! Quer saber o que faço toda semana?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes. What do you do on Monday?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: On Monday I go to school and study math.
turns.pt: Na segunda vou pra escola e estudo matemática.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: And on Tuesday?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: On Tuesday I have surf practice after school.
turns.pt: Na terça tenho treino de surf depois da escola.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: What about Wednesday?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Wednesday is my English class with Mr. Kumar.
turns.pt: Quarta é minha aula de inglês com o Mr. Kumar.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Do you rest on the weekend?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: On Saturday I surf, and on Sunday I sleep a lot.
turns.pt: No sábado surfo, no domingo durmo bastante.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Your week sounds busy but fun.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: It is. See you on Wednesday!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hey, do you have plans this weekend?
turns.pt: Ei, tem plano pro fim de semana?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes. I am going to visit my parents.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice. What are you going to do with them?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We are going to have dinner and watch a movie.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Sounds great. Are you going to stay overnight?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I am going to stay until Sunday evening.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Cool. I am going to go hiking on Saturday.
turns.pt: Massa. Vou fazer trilha no sábado.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is great. Are you going alone?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: No, my friends are going to join me.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Have a wonderful time.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Thanks. You too!

ordinal-dates.title: Birthday planning
ordinal-dates.pt_summary: Datas e números ordinais — first, second, third, twenty-first.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hi! My birthday is coming up. Guess when?
turns.pt: Oi! Meu aniversário tá chegando. Advinha quando?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Is it in June?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Yes! Can you guess the date?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Is it on the fifteenth of June?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Close. It is on the twenty-first of June.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That is the first day of winter.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Exactly. What day of the week is it this year?
turns.pt: Exato. Que dia da semana cai esse ano?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It is a Saturday.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. Can you come to my party?
turns.pt: Perfeito. Pode vir na minha festa?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I would love to come.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Awesome. See you on the twenty-first!

at-in-on-places.title: Meeting at the café
at-in-on-places.pt_summary: Preposições de lugar — at, in, on.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hey, where are you right now?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am at the café on Main Street.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Nice. Are you inside or on the terrace?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am on the terrace, at a small table.
turns.pt_hint: ON the terrace, AT a small table.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. I am in a taxi on my way.
turns.pt: Ótimo. Estou num táxi a caminho.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How long until you arrive?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Ten minutes. I am in heavy traffic.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No worries. I am reading a book.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. See you soon.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: OK. See you in a few minutes.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I am almost there!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hello. Can you tell me your skills?
turns.pt: Olá. Pode me dizer suas habilidades?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes. I can speak English and Portuguese.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Impressive. Can you write code?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I can write in Python and JavaScript.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Can you work under pressure?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I can stay calm during deadlines.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Can you start next Monday?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I can start on Monday.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: One last question — can you drive?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: No, I cannot, but I take the bus.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: That is fine. Welcome to the team!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hey. What do you like doing in your free time?
turns.pt: Ei. O que gosta de fazer no tempo livre?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I love reading books and watching movies.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Cool. Do you like cooking?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I like cooking Italian food.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Do you hate anything?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, I hate waking up early.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Same here. What about sports?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I love swimming but I do not like running.
turns.pt_hint: 'Adoro nadar mas não gosto de correr.'

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Let's go swimming this Saturday!

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Great idea. I love that plan.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Perfect. See you on Saturday!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Welcome. What do you do for a living?
turns.pt: Bem-vindo. O que você faz da vida?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I am a software engineer.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Great. How long have you worked as one?
turns.pt: Ótimo. Há quanto tempo trabalha nisso?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: For five years.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What do your parents do?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: My father is a doctor and my mother is a teacher.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: And your dream job?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I want to be a chef someday.
